description_long: This object is a whimsical amusement park structure resembling a fantasy castle made from interlocking wooden blocks. The design features tall, angular towers with pointed tops, surrounded by a perimeter of crenellated walls that evoke a fortified enclosure. Two colorful, suspended banners—one blue and one red—stretch between the towers, adding a festive and playful touch. The central entrance is arched, leading into an open courtyard area, while the towers vary in height and geometric shape, creating visual interest. The wood grain texture is visible throughout, giving the structure a natural, handcrafted appearance. The overall form is both inviting and imaginative, suitable for a themed play area or decorative park centerpiece.
description: A fantasy castle structure made of wooden blocks with tall towers, crenellated walls, and colorful suspended banners. The design is playful and festive, evoking a handcrafted amusement park attraction.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main arched entrance, two tall towers with blue and red banners, and the full perimeter of crenellated walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular geometry of the towers and the red banner stretching between the tallest structures.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the towers, the blue banner, and the enclosed courtyard area within the walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the red banner, the layered block construction of the towers, and the open courtyard.
